data.text: filled or covered with feces; also: contaminated with feces
examples: Raising children forces adults into a life marked by spit-up stains, poopy diapers, homework assignments, …, hugs and kisses, circles under the eyes and, for those of us who work, bucketloads of guilt.
A Ph.D. in microbiology is not necessary to grasp the concept: Clean water is good. Poopy water is bad.
… the Upper East Side holds not only some of the poshest homes, but also the poopiest sidewalks. Findings … show a “concerning” level of turd-related pathogens …
Though it never lost money, profits were "kind of poopy," says Johnny White.
